OneMem Media Kit

One memory layer for every agent. Decentralized persistent memory for AI agents.

onemem.xyz docs.onemem.xyz x.com/OneMemAI github.com/Blockchain-Oracle/onemem
Use OpenClaw spelling.
Keep the story memory-first; proof is the confidence layer.
Use third-party logos only for truthful identification, not endorsement.
Do not use OneMem .ai domains.
Do not claim WASI, Nautilus, or TEE as shipped behavior without implementation evidence.
Do not call brand launch media final live proof.

Designer Briefs

Prompt and product-truth briefing for designers, ChatGPT, and video agents.
one-mem-full-brand-and-asset-brief.md

Full brand and asset brief

Copy/paste prompt and asset direction

briefs/one-mem-full-brand-and-asset-brief.md
ASSET_CLEANUP.md

Asset cleanup manifest

Canonical, deleted-output, reference-link, and disposable asset boundaries

Export README

designer-campaign/exports/README.md

README hero PNG

Exact 1280x420 README banner

designer-campaign/exports/static/readme-hero.png

X header PNG

Exact 1500x500 X profile banner

designer-campaign/exports/static/x-header.png

Link card PNG

Exact 1200x630 social link card

designer-campaign/exports/static/link-card.png

Tools poster PNG

Exact 1600x900 tools and integrations board

designer-campaign/exports/static/tools-poster.png

Architecture PNG

Exact 1920x1080 designed architecture board

designer-campaign/exports/static/architecture.png

Launch video MP4

30-second 1920x1080 launch video with silent placeholder audio

designer-campaign/exports/video/onemem-launch-30s.mp4
export-designer-campaign.mjs

Campaign export script

Regenerates static boards and the launch MP4 from the raw zip

designer-campaign/scripts/export-designer-campaign.mjs
generate-audio-provenance.mjs

Audio provenance script

Regenerates launch-audio provenance without retaining reference audio

designer-campaign/scripts/generate-audio-provenance.mjs
generate-reference-benchmark.mjs

Reference benchmark script

Measures raw-zip reference videos without keeping copied MP4s

designer-campaign/scripts/generate-reference-benchmark.mjs

Proof Boundary

Use these assets without overstating live proof.

Brand media is not final live proof. Use a separate approved capture and verification pass before making real-wallet, physical-device, or live-runtime proof claims.
